visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair pulled back and wearing a white layered mesh top waves enthusiastically at the camera. She holds the device in a selfie style, moving around a modern restaurant with wood-textured walls and TASTY branding. Social media interface elements, including scrolling comments and heart icons, are superimposed on the frame. (2) The scene transitions to a wide shot of a dining table covered in diverse steakhouse dishes, including salads, soups, and plated steaks. The woman sits behind the table, holding a fork and knife with a wide-eyed, joyful expression. (3) Several close-up shots follow, showing the woman taking large bites of steak and chewing with visible satisfaction and closed eyes. Vivid red and white text banners appear at the bottom of the screen to highlight promotional terms. (4) A final static graphic appears, designed as a red promotional poster. It features the woman with her hands on her cheeks in a blissful pose next to a platter of seafood, with bold text outlining dates and terms.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: TASTY. [Variety]: LIVE. (2) [Subtitle]: 大家好.我是美食水水千千. [Variety]: ❤️🔥😮😍✨. (3) [Slogan]: 美味MOMENT. [Subtitle]: 3月1號到4月30號. (4) [Slogan]: 到西堤牛排喊出『美味MOMENT』並消費兩客經典套餐. [Slogan]: 西堤免費招待你美式手抓海鮮拼盤乙份.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main female influencer is the sole human subject visible throughout the footage.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back in a neat ponytail. She wears a white, sheer, high-neck mesh long-sleeved top over a white camisole.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial setting is the interior of a TASTY steakhouse with warm orange lighting, wood panels, and framed graphic art. It then transitions to a studio-like setup of a table filled with food, followed by a graphic promotional background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly, simulating the informal and high-arousal delivery of a social media live stream. An upbeat acoustic-pop background track with rhythmic guitar strumming and subtle synth pads plays at a lower volume. (2) A sharp, cartoon-style 'pop' sound effect marks a transition. The female voice maintains its energy but adopts a more deliberate, professional narrative cadence suitable for a commercial announcement. (3) The background music volume swells slightly as the speaker delivers promotional details. High-frequency 'ding' and 'sparkle' sound effects are inserted at key points to emphasize specific call-to-action phrases. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic vocal sign-off and a sharp cut to silence as the music ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Social Interaction -> Promotional Detail -> Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a seasonal discount and gift offer at TASTY steakhouse. The video leverages a popular food influencer's persona and a simulated 'live stream' format to build authentic engagement before transitioning into a clear commercial advertisement with explicit reward instructions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features direct brand callouts for TASTY (西堤牛排), a specific limited-time seafood offer, and detailed consumption requirements for customers to receive a gift.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video successfully uses a 'Live' interface simulation to capture the attention of social media users, effectively blending influencer vlog aesthetics with structured brand promotion.
